title: polycarpon tetraphyllum f. ovalifolium
intro: Polycarpon tetraphyllum f. ovalifolium, a lesser-known variant of the polycarpon tetraphyllum plant, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Polycarpon tetraphyllum f. ovalifolium include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
